message:
feat(pt-telemetry): add shadow mode observation storage

Implements process_triage-psc with tiered retention storage for shadow
mode observations:

- RetentionTier enum (Hot/Warm/Cold/Archive) with configurable policies
- ShadowStorage struct with hot cache and identity indexing
- Query patterns: get_current_state, get_history, get_events, get_by_score
- Automatic compaction between retention tiers
- Arrow schema for persistence
- Comprehensive unit tests (13 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
